title: ETQ-101 v2: E8-Root-Derived, D4-Triality Ternary MIDI Model
description:
ETQ-101 v2.0.0 is a deterministic mathematical sonification specification combining an E8-root-derived selected graph, an explicit order-three D4 triality action, 33 three-state direct-sum orbit blocks plus two fixed singlets, a selected-graph degree potential, dimensionless dynamics, and a bijective low/mid/high ternary MIDI note codebook.

The root ETQ profile defines symbolic MIDI notes, not canonical frequencies, timbre, loudness, PCM, or rendered audio. The deposit contains the formal specification, canonical fixtures, dependency-free reference construction, verification scripts, and claim-boundary documentation. The DOI-linked v1.0.0 contract remains preserved as a legacy specification-identity fixture; its renderer was not implemented. The software is distributed under the Mozilla Public License 2.0 with explicit authorship and citation metadata.

This metadata describes v2.0.0; the existing DOI badge identifies the archived v1.0.0 release until a v2 archive is deposited.
